stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 Draw Revealed — Fritz vs Draper, Ruud vs Hurkacz Headline Blockbuster First Round

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Wimbledon 2026 draw is in.

Fritz vs Draper in the first round. Ruud vs Hurkacz. Sinner and Djokovic on a collision course for the semis.

Championships start June 29. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Fritz vs Draper at Wimbledon R1.

Draper just lost his Eastbourne SF. Fritz rested after skipping the event.

Then the draw is made — and they're matched up on Day 1. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #ATPTour [URL]

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026 Draw: Fritz vs Draper, Ruud vs Hurkacz Headline Blockbuster First Round as Sinner and Djokovic Land in Same Half

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Wimbledon Draw — Fritz vs Draper, Blockbusters

**Social (1080x1350):**
- Search term: `Taylor Fritz tennis`
- Credit: (USA TODAY Sports Images)
- Usage: Fritz on grass court — he is the seeded player and the story angle is the Fritz/Draper R1 clash

**Article Hero (1200x630):**
- Search term: `Jack Draper tennis`
- Credit: (Imagn Images)
- Usage: Draper at Wimbledon or in grass-court action; he is the crowd favourite in the storyline

stories.title: Eastbourne Semifinals — Humbert Edges Draper in Three Sets, Samuel Beats Bergs

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Humbert beats Draper in three sets at Eastbourne. Samuel def. Bergs 6-3, 6-4.

Final Saturday: Humbert vs Samuel.

And Draper's reward from the draw? Fritz in R1 at Wimbledon. 🎾 #Eastbourne #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Eastbourne Semifinals: Humbert Edges Draper in Three Sets, Samuel Through — Final is Saturday

stories.title: Bad Homburg WTA Semifinals — Osaka Eyes First Grass Final, Muchova vs Ruse

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Bad Homburg WTA SFs today on Centre Court:

🎾 Osaka vs Wang (seeking 1st career grass final)
🎾 Ruse vs Muchova

Ruse is ranked No. 105 and already beat Navarro. Final Saturday. #WTATennis #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Bad Homburg WTA Semifinals: Osaka Eyes Career-First Grass Final as Ruse Meets Muchova for Second Spot

stories.title: Wimbledon Women's Draw — Swiatek Faces Townsend, Serena in Same Quarter; Andreeva Eyes Rare Double

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon women's draw:

🎾 Swiatek (3) vs Townsend — Serena in same quarter
🎾 Sabalenka (1) vs Kostovic
🎾 Rybakina (2) vs Boisson
🎾 Andreeva (5) chasing a RG/Wimbledon double not seen since Henin 2006

🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #WTATennis [URL]

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026 Women's Draw: Swiatek Faces Serena Threat in Same Quarter, Andreeva Eyes Historic Roland Garros/Wimbledon Double

stories.title: Mallorca Semifinals — Marozsan Stuns ADF, Borges Sets Up Saturday Final

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Mallorca SFs done:

🎾 Marozsan def. ADF (No. 2 seed) 6-4, 6-3
🎾 Borges def. Quinn 7-6(1), 6-4

Final Saturday: Marozsan vs Borges. Two days before Wimbledon. 🎾 #ATPTour #Wimbledon2026 [URL]
